source: Sidherun PHB 2_8_2026.docx -- embedded image (media/image6.png), located in the 'Movement and Time - General Rules' chapter, immediately after the paragraph beginning 'The higher your AGI, the further you can move in a round...'
notes: Cells marked null were literally '?' in the source image (CELESTIAL column, all three movement rows). The source leaves these values undefined rather than blank -- preserved as null with this note rather than guessed at.

Flight/Special Move values of the form '*N Above' are literal footnote-style references in the source image meaning 'see the Flight/Special Move Notes section, multiplier tier N', not numeric values -- reproduced as strings, not resolved to numbers here. See rules/09-movement.md 'Flight/Special Move Notes' for the actual multipliers (e.g. HEROIC = fly at 2x, NOBLE = 3x, ENHANCED = 4x, AUGMENTED = 5x).
